name: Vercel Ai Gateway
description: Vercel AI Gateway provider for routing model requests through a single endpoint.

AIGATEWAY_API_KEY.label: Api Key
AIGATEWAY_API_KEY.help: Alternate env var for AI Gateway API key.

VERCEL_OIDC_TOKEN.label: Oidc Token
VERCEL_OIDC_TOKEN.help: OIDC token for Vercel (used as Bearer auth for Gateway).

AI_GATEWAY_API_KEY.label: Gateway Api Key
AI_GATEWAY_API_KEY.help: API key for Vercel AI Gateway (OpenAI-compatible endpoints).

AI_GATEWAY_BASE_URL.label: Gateway Base Url
AI_GATEWAY_BASE_URL.help: Base URL for AI Gateway OpenAI-compatible API.

AI_GATEWAY_IMAGE_MODEL.label: Gateway Image Model
AI_GATEWAY_IMAGE_MODEL.help: Identifier of the model used for image generation.

AI_GATEWAY_LARGE_MODEL.label: Gateway Large Model
AI_GATEWAY_LARGE_MODEL.help: Identifier of the large language model to be used.

AI_GATEWAY_SMALL_MODEL.label: Gateway Small Model
AI_GATEWAY_SMALL_MODEL.help: Identifier of the small language model to be used.

AI_GATEWAY_EMBEDDING_MODEL.label: Gateway Embedding Model
AI_GATEWAY_EMBEDDING_MODEL.help: Identifier of the model to use for generating text embeddings.

AI_GATEWAY_EMBEDDING_DIMENSIONS.label: Gateway Embedding Dimensions
AI_GATEWAY_EMBEDDING_DIMENSIONS.help: Number of dimensions for the returned embedding vectors.
